items.name: nexus-font
items.title: Nexus UI Inter Font
items.description: Inter font setup used by Nexus UI components so installed components match the preview typography.

items.name: scroll-progress-bar
items.title: Scroll Progress Bar
items.description: A minimal vertical progress rail that fills smoothly as a target section moves through the viewport or a scrollable container.

items.name: wheel-selector
items.title: Wheel Selector
items.description: An interactive radial navigation dial for services, features, or portfolio items with drag, wheel, and click input plus a responsive mobile arch.

items.name: cinematic-card-deck
items.title: Cinematic Card Deck
items.description: A scroll-linked 3D card stack with depth, ambient glow, progress dots, cursor parallax, and optional image-backed cards.

items.name: cursor-text-reveal
items.title: Cursor Text Reveal
items.description: An immersive cursor-following spotlight that reveals alternate text, gradients, or imagery beneath perfectly aligned headline layers.

items.name: cinematic-logo-cloud
items.title: Cinematic Logo Cloud
items.description: A staggered blur-fade entrance animation for brand logos. Uses framer-motion and fully semantic responsive layouts.

items.name: step-flow
items.title: Step Flow
items.description: A responsive four-step process section with a sliding highlight, animated image swaps, and hover or click step selection.

items.name: phone-input
items.title: Phone Input
items.description: A modern animated phone number input with country selector and validation.

items.name: hero-aurora-spotlight
items.title: Aurora Hero Spotlight
items.description: Cursor-reactive spotlight layered over an aurora field for launch heroes.

items.name: bento-signal-grid
items.title: Signal Bento Grid
items.description: Animated bento tiles with breathing gradients for product metrics.

items.name: nebula-glass-card
items.title: Nebula Glass Card
items.description: 3D tilt card with spring physics and luminous edge lighting.

items.name: float-glass-navbar
items.title: Float Glass Navbar
items.description: Glass navigation rail with spring entrance and CTA emphasis.

items.name: orbit-footer
items.title: Orbit Footer
items.description: Compact footer with balanced columns and developer-first links.

items.name: depth-testimonials
items.title: Depth Testimonials
items.description: Stacked testimonial planes with staggered motion reveals.

items.name: toggle-pricing-pro
items.title: Toggle Pricing
items.description: Annual/monthly toggle with spring knob and contextual savings callout.

items.name: beam-sweep-field
items.title: Beam Sweep Field
items.description: Slow sweeping light column for cinematic section backgrounds.

items.name: vector-tilt-scene
items.title: Vector Tilt Scene
items.description: High depth glass panel for hero cards and feature highlights.

items.name: glass-login-stack
items.title: Glass Login Stack
items.description: Minimal glass authentication panel with crisp focus states.

items.name: split-signup-convert
items.title: Split Signup Convert
items.description: Two-column signup with narrative panel and compact fields.

items.name: signup-form
items.title: Signup Form
items.description: Customizable signup form built on shadcn input + label with subtle framer-motion transitions and async submit states.

items.name: workbench-sidebar
items.title: Workbench Sidebar
items.description: Dense sidebar navigation tuned for dashboards and tools.

items.name: pulse-dashboard-kpis
items.title: Pulse Dashboard KPIs
items.description: KPI strip with micro-hover lifts and soft chart placeholders.

items.name: orbital-loader
items.title: Orbital Loader
items.description: Dual counter-rotating rings with breathing inner glow.

items.name: milestone-timeline
items.title: Milestone Timeline
items.description: Vertical roadmap timeline with glowing nodes.

items.name: lattice-feature-grid
items.title: Lattice Feature Grid
items.description: Four-up feature grid with scroll reveals and glass tiles.

items.name: motion-faq-disclosure
items.title: Motion FAQ Disclosure
items.description: Lightweight FAQ with directional affordance and animated answers.

items.name: nebula-cta-glow
items.title: Nebula CTA Glow
items.description: Pulsing dual nebula glow behind a high-contrast CTA.

items.name: glow-button
items.title: Glow Button
items.description: Framer-style glowing CTA button with expanding shadow, radial border sweep, glass edge, and animated arrow.

items.name: word-magnet
items.title: Word Magnet
items.description: Cursor-reactive text where whole words gently repel from the pointer and spring back without splitting letters.

items.name: three-d-folder
items.title: 3D Folder Card
items.description: Interactive folder card that opens on hover, fans project cards upward, and includes a lightbox gallery for visual collections.

items.name: draggable-card-stack
items.title: Draggable Card Stack
items.description: Shuffled deck of portrait cards on a dark surface. Drag or fling the top card to send it to the back; press ← to pull the bottom card to the front. Supports images and videos, hover overlay, auto-play, and fully configurable stack geometry.

items.name: card-carousel-3d
items.title: 3D Card Carousel
items.description: Cylindrical 3D card carousel — cards arranged in a circle on the Z axis, rotating continuously or on scroll. Radius, perspective, item size, speed, and direction are all configurable.

items.name: real-time-cursors
items.title: Real-Time Cursors
items.description: Collaborative workspace preview with animated teammate cursors, code review cards, and simulated live presence trails.

items.name: editorial-blog-rail
items.title: Editorial Blog Rail
items.description: Featured article plus compact secondary headlines for content hubs.

items.name: split-contact-glass
items.title: Split Contact Glass
items.description: Marketing narrative paired with a compact contact capture form.

items.name: svg-noise-shader
items.title: SVG Noise Shader
items.description: FeTurbulence-driven noise field for textured sci-fi surfaces.

items.name: tracing-spotlight-panel
items.title: Tracing Spotlight Panel
items.description: Cursor-traced highlight for feature callouts and pricing tiers.

items.name: forge-ai-command-bar
items.title: Forge AI Command Bar
items.description: Command surface for AI copilots with motion layout container.

items.name: gooey-input
items.title: Gooey Search Input
items.description: Expandable pill search with a detached icon bubble merged through an SVG goo filter and spring layout.

items.name: terminal
items.title: Interactive Terminal
items.description: macOS-style terminal window with typewriter commands, cursor blink, output sequencing, and optional sound.

items.name: squiggly-text
items.title: RippleLine squiggly text
items.description: Hero-grade headline with an animated wave underline, turbulence + Gaussian blur + displacement, optional glyph micro-warp, and reduced-motion fallbacks.

items.name: floating-dock
items.title: Nexus floating dock
items.description: Bottom-centered macOS-style dock with pointer-driven magnification, neighbor scaling, glass pill chrome, tooltips, and a touch-friendly expandable mobile menu.

items.name: stateful-button
items.title: Stateful message button
items.description: Animated async button with idle → loading → success transitions, built-in click guarding, and smooth icon/text motion.

items.name: sparkles
items.title: Sparkles field
items.description: Configurable animated particle field for hero highlights, card backgrounds, and decorative UI layers with optional pointer interaction.

items.name: text-generate-effect
items.title: Text Generate Effect
items.description: Animated text reveal that fades words, characters, or lines into view with optional blur and upward motion.

items.name: background-gradient
items.title: Background Gradient
items.description: Animated gradient wrapper with soft glow and blur for cards, buttons, and hero sections.

items.name: typewriter-effect
items.title: Typewriter Effect
items.description: Character-by-character typewriter text animation with blinking cursor, optional deleting, looping, and semantic heading support.

items.name: text-reveal-card
items.title: Text Reveal Card
items.description: Interactive spotlight card with mouse-follow glow and bottom reveal content for features, case studies, and portfolio sections.

items.name: glowing-effect-cards
items.title: Glowing Effect Cards
items.description: Cursor-reactive glowing border cards with a responsive 2-1-2 layout for refined SaaS sections and dashboards.

items.name: infinite-moving-cards
items.title: Infinite Moving Cards
items.description: Customizable infinite marquee of cards with seamless looping, direction controls, hover pause, and optional custom rendering.

items.name: meteors
items.title: Meteor Effect
items.description: Animated diagonal meteor beams with glow heads and trailing streaks, designed as a reusable background layer for cards and hero sections.

items.name: background-boxes
items.title: Background Boxes
items.description: Animated isometric grid background with hover color effects and cross markers. Fully configurable skew, scale, box dimensions, and colors.

items.name: encrypted-text
items.title: Encrypted Text
items.description: Characters shuffle through gibberish before locking into the final string — a futuristic cyber decoding reveal for hero headings, buttons, badges, and nav links.

items.name: mac-keyboard
items.title: Mac Keyboard
items.description: Fully interactive Mac-style keyboard with Web Audio synthesised click sounds, Framer Motion keycap animations, and real-time physical keyboard highlighting.

items.name: images-badge
items.title: Images Badge
items.description: Stacked avatar/image pill that fans open on hover — ideal for team badges, social proof, avatar groups, and template galleries.

items.name: dot-grid-hero
items.title: Interactive Dot Grid Hero
items.description: Cinematic hero section with a Canvas-rendered dot grid that reacts to cursor proximity — dots scale, brighten, and return to rest with a smooth radial glow spotlight.

items.name: starfield-hero
items.title: Interactive Starfield Hero
items.description: Dark hero section with a cursor-reactive starfield. Hundreds of glowing particles stretch, brighten, and rotate toward the cursor — built on Canvas + requestAnimationFrame at 60 fps.

items.name: compare
items.title: Before / After Compare
items.description: Drag a vertical handle to compare two images side-by-side. Supports mouse and touch, optional labels, custom start position, and any aspect ratio.

items.name: expandable-cards
items.title: Expandable Cards
items.description: Responsive card grid where clicking a card smoothly expands it into a full-detail overlay with image, description, and a CTA button.

items.name: animated-select-headline
items.title: Animated Select Headline
items.description: A cycling word headline where each active word is highlighted with a Figma-style selection rectangle — thin border with corner handles — using blur-fade transitions.

items.name: warp-speed-card
items.title: Warp Speed Card
items.description: A focused warp-speed effect — hover a single phrase to reveal a dark space scene with streaking beams confined to the text's bounding box. The text itself stays static; the effect lives entirely behind it.

items.name: circular-carousel
items.title: Circular Carousel
items.description: An animated orbital carousel with smooth active-card transitions.

items.name: chat-messages
items.title: Chat Messages
items.description: Animated chat message bubbles with typing indicators and sequential reveal.

items.name: shader-flow
items.title: Shader Flow
items.description: A soft animated shader-style background with flowing gradient motion.

items.name: ask-nexus-input
items.title: Ask Nexus Input
items.description: A bold \

items.name: interactive-globe-explorer
items.title: Interactive Globe Explorer
items.description: Scrollable office/location explorer with a live React Globe, synchronized city list, clickable map pins, responsive details popover, and one-click address/email copy actions.

items.name: scroll-reveal-text
items.title: Scroll Reveal Text
items.description: Scroll-linked text reveal where words, characters, or lines emerge from muted gray to bright white with optional blur dissolve and staggered cascade.

items.name: animated-countdown
items.title: Animated Countdown
items.description: Flip-style countdown timer with four variants — modern, digital, minimal, and classic. Smooth number transitions powered by Framer Motion.

items.name: shooting-stars-grid
items.title: Shooting Stars Grid
items.description: Animated dot grid with diagonal shooting star streaks and glowing nodes. A dramatic yet subtle background for hero sections and feature blocks.

items.name: hover-highlight-text
items.title: Hover Highlight Text
items.description: Cursor-tracked SVG spotlight that reveals outlined text beneath a base layer. Smooth spring physics follow the mouse for a cinematic hover effect.

items.name: motion-layer-scroller
items.title: Motion Layer Scroller
items.description: Scroll-driven parallax depth engine — each layer moves at an independent speed and axis as the user scrolls. Compose scenes with overlapping planes.

items.name: animated-bento-grid
items.title: Animated Bento Grid
items.description: Feature showcase bento grid with entrance animations and configurable column spans. Each tile supports custom content, tags, and motion entrance delays.

items.name: bento-grid-skeleton
items.title: Bento Grid Skeleton
items.description: Bento grid with animated skeleton placeholder tiles — chat, dashboard, avatar, workflow, calendar, and code variants. Perfect for loading states.

items.name: scrolling-testimonials
items.title: Scrolling Testimonials
items.description: Infinite vertical scroll testimonial wall with multi-column layout, independent column speeds, reverse direction support, gradient fade masks, and avatar initials fallback.

items.name: spectra-frame
items.title: Spectra Frame
items.description: Zero-dependency interactive image grid — photos start in black & white and burst into full color on hover with adaptive scale. Built-in responsive columns, scoped CSS injection, and picsum placeholder defaults.

items.name: profile-orbit
items.title: Profile Orbit
items.description: An interactive profile carousel where five floating avatars orbit a central card. Clicking any avatar, the nav arrows, or the keyboard cycles through people with a smooth fade + spring animation.

items.name: command-palette
items.title: Command Palette
items.description: Animated command palette with ⌘K shortcut, grouped navigation/actions/theme commands, backdrop blur overlay, and Framer Motion enter/exit transitions.

items.name: image-trail
items.title: Image Trail
items.description: A cursor trail that cycles through a configurable image array as you move, with fade-blur transitions and an optional magnetic repulsion effect.

items.name: avatar-group
items.title: Avatar Group
items.description: Overlapping avatar stack with per-avatar entrance animations (flip, slide, scale, bounce), four hover styles, name tooltips, and automatic color-coded fallback initials when no image is supplied.

items.name: feature-tools-card
items.title: Feature Tools Card
items.description: A dark glass card with five magnetic icon slots, a rotating conic-gradient orbit ring, and 3-D tilt physics. Swap the default integration icons for any SVG or image.

items.name: link-preview
items.title: Link Preview
items.description: Hover-triggered image tooltip that transforms inline text links into cinematic visual previews. Spring-animated entrance with blur, scale, mouse-tracking tilt, and a soft floating glide — perfect for blogs, portfolios, and product pages.

items.name: pricing-section
items.title: Pricing Section
items.description: Four interactive pricing layouts with radio selection, animated monthly and yearly billing transitions, and configurable feature lists.

items.name: logo-clouds
items.title: Brand Logo Animation
items.description: A complete set of animated logo cloud layouts including marquee, spotlight, swapping, and blur variants.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Simple, collapsible, and grouped animated sidebar navigation layouts.

items.name: contact-page
items.title: Contact Page
items.description: Contact block variants with forms, social links, imagery, and the included Nexus mark.

items.name: blog-content-sections
items.title: Blog Content Sections
items.description: Centered article, table-of-contents, editorial, featured post, and hover-card blog sections.
